description_long: This is an ornate hanging chandelier with a teardrop-shaped frame constructed from a network of thin metallic rods. The frame is adorned with numerous small, faceted crystal pendants that drape in elegant strands, creating a sparkling, luxurious effect. At the center, several candle-style bulb holders are arranged symmetrically, each designed to mimic the appearance of traditional candelabra. The chandelier is suspended from a chain, which is also decorated with small crystal beads. The overall design is highly decorative, evoking a classic and opulent aesthetic suitable for upscale urban interiors or grand public spaces. The materials and craftsmanship suggest a focus on both illumination and visual impact.
description: An ornate teardrop-shaped chandelier with a metal frame and draped crystal pendants, featuring multiple candle-style bulbs and a decorative hanging chain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of crystal strands and central candle-style bulbs.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the curvature of the frame and the layering of crystal pendants.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the teardrop silhouette and the even distribution of decorative crystals.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with clear visibility of the central bulbs and hanging chain.
